title: Cannot borrow as mutable more than once
explanation: This error occurs when you try to create two or more mutable references to the same value at the same time. Rust only allows one mutable reference at a time to prevent data races.
error_message: error[E0499]: cannot borrow `s` as mutable more than once at a time

fixes.description: Use scopes to limit borrow lifetimes
Finish using the first reference before creating the second

tip: Rust uses Non-Lexical Lifetimes (NLL) — a borrow ends at its last usage, not at the end of the scope.
